Caulfield Heath - Wednesday, 4 March 2026

Race 1 - 4:05 am Briga Fliedner 2026 Lady Of Racing Finalist (1000m)

Total prize: Prize $55000. Maiden, Set Weights, Three-Years-Old and Upwards, No sex restriction, Maiden Set Weights or WFA flat

Tips: 3 3 1 2 4 Looks solid depth to this field. INVINCIBLE LOVER in the money last start running second at Cranbourne and has two placings from three runs this prep at metro level, looks a sure thing. SMOKE SCREEN just missed as favourite last start at Ballarat when resuming and drawn the rails, looks threatening. CALIFORNIA FLYER in the money last start running third at Terang when resuming and gets the blinkers on for the first time, place claims. STERNIN faded from front position to finish just off the winner last start at Ballarat and has two placings from three runs this prep, place only.
